title: How to do a fresh start

messages.content:
# Having issues with the game, and you want to do a clean fresh start ?
-# Credit: <@164579566772420609>

## Step 1
> Delete the __Assetto Corsa Steam folder__, then uninstall the game from your Steam library if required.
> 
> - Follow <#1322235675239645184> to find your Assetto Corsa folder.

## Step 2
> Delete the __Assetto Corsa folder in "Documents"__ (make a backup of this folder if you want to keep screenshots, graphics/controls presets, etc)

## Step 3
> Delete the Content manager folder
> - Press Windows key + R
> - Type in %localappdata% and hit enter 
> - Delete the __"AcTools Content Manager"__ folder.

## Step 4
> Follow <#985372285668036639> to re-install the No Hesi mods.
